Who Is Hakim
Careers

Hakim Optical is always interested in bringing in the best and brightest individuals to work with our team and continue our tradition as a leader in the industry. If you’re interested in careers with Hakim Optical, please refer to our postings below.

 

LICENSED OPTICIAN / STUDENT OPTICIAN
Student Optician / Intern
IN-STORE RECEPTIONIST
Good English and well groomed individual.
Extravert, outspoken, organized.
Retail experience an asset; training available.
LAB EYEGLASS TECHNICIAN
Self starting, technical minded individual for position in eyeglass making facility.
Training available, light mechanics involving edging, mounting, surfacing and generating.
Lab experience an asset; training available.

To apply to any of the positions posted, please fax your resume to:

Fax: (416) 323-0660
Attention: Human Resources
Or mail it to us at:
Hakim Optical Laboratory Limited
Human Resources
1325 The Queensway
Etobicoke, ON
M8Z 1S8

Or e-mail it to us at:
jo**@**********al.ca
